title: Snap alums unveil Ghost Angels fund
summary: Twenty former Snap employees have launched Ghost Angels, a venture fund focused on backing next-generation social media companies. The fund represents a significant bet by experienced tech entrepreneurs on the future of social platforms.
content: A group of 20 Snap alumni has come together to launch a fund called Ghost Angels to back the next generation of social media.

zh.title: Snap前员工推出Ghost Angels基金
zh.summary: 20名前Snap员工推出了Ghost Angels风险基金，专注于支持下一代社交媒体公司。该基金代表了经验丰富的科技企业家对社交平台未来的重大押注。

title: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
summary: The film Backrooms earned $38 million on its opening day and is projected to reach $90 million for the opening weekend, breaking A24's previous record. The horror film's massive success is particularly notable given its modest $10 million budget, making it exceptionally profitable.
content:
The Kane Parsons' film Backrooms is expected to earn up to $90 million in its opening weekend after pulling down $38 million on Friday alone. That's not only above expectations, but absolutely obliterates A24's previous opening weekend record of $25.5 million for Alex Garland's Civil War. It's also a better opening day than The Mandalorian and Grogu, which only pulled down $33.7 million on its way to a total $81.6 million for the weekend. 
That also means that Backrooms is an incredibly profitable movie, with an estimated $10 million budget. By comparison, the latest Star Wars disappointment cost $165 million and was considered affordable c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《地下室》成为大片，首日票房达3800万美元
zh.summary: 《地下室》首日票房达3800万美元，预计首周末票房将达9000万美元，打破A24之前的纪录。考虑到该恐怖片的预算仅为1000万美元，这部电影的巨大成功尤其引人注目，使其利润异常丰厚。

title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
summary: GitHub Copilot is transitioning to token-based billing, triggering significant backlash from developers who view the change negatively. The shift marks a departure from the previous subscription model for the AI coding assistant.
content: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

zh.title: "太荒唐了"：Github Copilot的新代币计费模式引发开发者不满
zh.summary: GitHub Copilot正在过渡到代币计费模式，这一变化引发了开发者的严重反弹，他们对这一改变持负面看法。这一转变标志着对AI编码助手之前订阅模式的偏离。

title: Welcome to Night Vale host Cecil Baldwin shares his tech pet peeves
summary: Cecil Baldwin, best known as the host of the podcast Welcome to Night Vale, discusses his personal technology frustrations and preferences. The article explores his tech views through his diverse entertainment career spanning voice acting, documentaries, and theater.
content:
Cecil Baldwin is a busy man with some dope boots. | Image: Cecil Baldwin	

Cecil Baldwin's résumé includes appearances on Gravity Falls, narrating the documentary Scream, Queen! My Nightmare on Elm Street, and performing as part of the New York Neo-Futurists theater company. But he is best known as the host of the podcast Welcome to Night Vale, a long-running fiction show that blends macabre Lovecraftian horror with absurdist comedy. As Cecil Palmer, the voice of Night Vale Community Radio, Baldwin keeps the people of the titular town abreast of all the goings ons with the Faceless Old Woman Who Secretly Lives in Your Home and offers tips on how to best maintain their Bloodstone circles. 
He also cohosts Random Nu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
summary: Meta is reportedly developing an AI-powered wearable pendant as part of its broader strategy to expand into artificial intelligence hardware. The device represents the company's continued investment in integrating AI into personal wearables.
content: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

zh.title: Meta据报道正在开发AI项链
zh.summary: Meta据报道正在开发一款AI驱动的可穿戴项链，作为其扩展至人工智能硬件领域战略的一部分。该设备代表了公司持续投资于将AI集成到个人可穿戴设备的努力。

title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
summary: Google's new Gemini Spark AI assistant can automate everyday tasks like email summaries and event planning with 24/7 availability. The tool's usefulness raises questions about why Google launched it as a standalone product rather than integrating it into existing services.
content: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

zh.title: 我使用了谷歌24小时AI助手Gemini Spark，效果相当不错
zh.summary: 谷歌新推出的Gemini Spark AI助手可以自动化电子邮件总结和活动规划等日常任务，并提供24小时可用性。这款工具的实用性引发了人们对谷歌为什么将其推出为独立产品而不是集成到现有服务中的疑问。

title: Microsoft is threatening legal action for disclosing exploits
summary: Microsoft is facing backlash for aggressively responding to a researcher's public disclosure of zero-day vulnerabilities, including disabling accounts and threatening criminal prosecution. The incident highlights ongoing tensions between responsible disclosure practices and Microsoft's strict coordination requirements.
content:
Microsoft is facing criticism for its handling of zero-day exploits. Someone going by the name Nightmare Eclipse has been publicly feuding with the company, posting proof-of-concept exploit code. Some of their posts suggest that they're a disgruntled former employee. But what caught cyber security researcher Kevin Beaumont's eye was how Microsoft has responded.
Microsoft suggests it plans to bring a criminal case against Nightmare Eclipse for failing to follow "proper coordination" in disclosing vulnerabilities. They also disabled Nightmare Eclipse's GitHub, GitLab, and Microsoft Security Response Center accounts disabled. As Beaumont point …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软因披露漏洞而威胁采取法律行动
zh.summary: 微软因积极应对研究人员公开披露零日漏洞而面临强烈反对，包括禁用账户和威胁刑事起诉。该事件凸显了负责任披露实践和微软严格协调要求之间的持续紧张关系。

title: Some of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
summary: Woot is offering significant discounts on Samsung's Frame TV and Hisense's CanvasTV, with savings up to 40% through June 26th. Both models deliver excellent art display experiences through matte screens and curated artwork libraries, though they differ in brightness, software, and warranty terms.
content:
Art TVs aren’t exactly known for being affordable, which is why Woot’s latest sale is notable. Now through June 26th, the retailer is discounting Samsung’s 2025 Frame TV and Hisense’s 2025 CanvasTV. The 65-inch CanvasTV is down to $779.99 ($520 off) — its best price of the year — while Samsung’s like-minded Frame TV is on sale in multiple sizes starting at $587.99 ($312 off). If you want a bigger set, the 75-inch CanvasTV is also on sale for $1,197.99 ($1,302 off). However, note that both Hisense models come with a one-year warranty, whereas the Frame TVs only include a 90-day warranty through Woot.
Hisense CanvasTV (2025)

Where to Buy:

 $2499.99 $1197.99 at Woot (75-inch)
 $1299.99 $779.99 at Woot (65-inch)


Samsung The Frame (2025)

Where to Buy:

 $899.99 $587.99 at Woot (43-inch)
 $1247.99 $797.99 at Woot (55-inch)
 $1697.99 $897.99 at Woot (65-inch)

Both 4K TVs deliver an excellent, art-focused experience. When my colleague John Higgins compared the two panels in November, he found that the artwork looked remarkably realistic on their matte displays, even though the Frame was brighter (661 vs. 527 nits) and handled reflections better. Hisense also includes a magnetic bezel with each purchase and, by default, access to more than 1,000 works by renowned artists such as Van Gogh and Monet. Samsung, meanwhile, charges up to $200 for its optional bezels, depending on the size, plus another $50 a year for access to its full suite of artwork.
In addition to blending easily into your home decor, both the Hisense and the Frame are great for watching TV and gaming. Each offers a max 144Hz variable refresh rate (except for the 43- and 50-inch Frame models), which helps make fast-paced action movies, sports, and games look smooth. The Frame also offers four HDMI 2.1 ports instead of just two, though the CanvasTV has the leg up when it comes to software, since it runs on Google’s intuitive TV interface rather than Samsung’s clunky Tizen OS. Both sets support Google Assi

zh.title: 我们喜爱的一些艺术电视本周末降价超过40%
zh.summary: Woot在6月26日前对三星Frame电视和海信CanvasTV提供高达40%的大幅折扣。两款机型都通过哑光屏幕和精选艺术作品库提供出色的艺术显示体验，但在亮度、软件和保修条款方面有所不同。

title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
summary: Top venture capitalists discuss the current AI investment boom and its effects on startup funding, where even very young founders can easily secure substantial capital commitments. The commentary raises concerns about potential groupthink and speculative overvaluation in the AI sector.
content: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.

zh.title: 群体思维热潮：三位顶级风投对AI狂热的真实看法
zh.summary: 顶级风险投资家讨论了当前的AI投资热潮及其对初创融资的影响，即使是年轻的初创创始人也能轻松获得大额资本承诺。评论引发了人们对AI行业潜在群体思维和投机性高估的担忧。

summary: Valve's new Steam Controller can produce musical sounds and tones through its haptic feedback system, enabling creative users to compose and play songs. The device demonstrates versatility beyond gaming through viral demonstrations of video game themes and famous Valve soundtrack pieces.

zh.title: 聆听新Steam控制器按毁灭战士的节奏发出的嗡鸣声
zh.summary: Valve的新Steam控制器可以通过其触觉反馈系统产生音乐声音，使创意用户能够创作和演奏歌曲。该设备通过病毒式视频演示视频游戏主题和著名Valve配乐片段，展现了超越游戏的多功能性。

title: Pebblebee’s Halo watches my back and my belongings
summary: Pebblebee's $59.99 Halo is a Bluetooth tracker that doubles as a personal safety device with a 130dB siren, LED strobe, and automatic emergency contact alerts. The device offers a practical alternative for personal security in situations where carrying pepper spray is illegal or inconvenient.
content:
I live in a part of Los Angeles where I feel safer bringing pepper spray on walks. The problem is, I don't always remember to bring it with me, and it's not legal to carry it everywhere I go. Pebblebee's $59.99 Halo Bluetooth tracker surprised me by being a suitable replacement because it doubles as a siren-equipped personal safety device, and I can bring it anywhere.
A quick pull of its cap triggers a bunch of safety features: Its 130dB siren will sound, its LEDs will strobe, and it will automatically alert up to five trusted contacts with text messages (Pebblebee's Alert Live service shares your location for 24 hours, or as a one-time loc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Pebblebee的Halo守护我和我的物品
zh.summary: Pebblebee $59.99的Halo是一款蓝牙追踪器，同时也是个人安全设备，配备130dB警报器、LED频闪灯和自动紧急联系人警报。该设备为在携带防狼喷雾非法或不便的情况下提供了个人安全的实用替代方案。

title: The Arduboy FX-C is an excellent time killer you might forget you’re carrying
summary: The Arduboy FX-C is a credit card-sized handheld gaming device offering a comprehensive library of games and apps in an extremely portable form factor. The device combines the original Arduboy's minimalist design with quality-of-life improvements, though its limited processor pushes developers toward creative solutions.
content:
The Arduboy FX-C squeezes a lot of entertainment into a thin, credit card-sized handheld.	

As handheld consoles continue to grow and push the limits of what you can actually hold in your hands, the Arduboy FX-C comes in a refreshingly pocketable package.  It manages to squeeze the best features of past models and some welcome upgrades into a handheld that’s still no larger or thicker than a few credit cards. It’s the best version of the Arduboy so far, particularly for gamers who want to jump into the handheld’s ever-expanding library of games and apps right out of the box, but one of its most compelling upgrades isn’t quite ready for primetime.
The original Arduboy was a Tetris-playing business card created by Kevin Bates to show off his electronics skills. It went viral in 2014 prompting Bates to turn the idea into a commercial device a year later that was both a tiny open-source gaming device and a tool that could help would-be developers learn to code.
Arduboy FX-C

Where to Buy:

 $79 at Amazon
 $79 at Arduboy

After over a decade of minor iterations, the Arduboy FX-C looks very much like the original. The controls are limited to six buttons, four of which function as a D-pad. They have a minimal amount of travel given the device is just 5mm thin, but a satisfying amount of click when pressed. The piezoelectric speaker is high pitched but more than loud enough, and its 1.3-inch, 1-bit OLED screen is bright enough to be playable outdoors.
While the 37-year-old original Game Boy could display four shades of greenish-gray, the Arduboy FX-C’s screen is monochromatic and limited to only white pixels. Developers have to rely on visual tricks like dithering or flickering to create grayscale graphics. Equally limiting is the FX-C’s ATmega32u4 processor that’s paired with just 2.5KB of RAM. Compared to other black-and-white handhelds like the Playdate, the Arduboy FX-C feels primitive but its limitations have forced game developers to get creative and experimental, whi

zh.title: Arduboy FX-C是一款你可能会忘记自己在携带的极佳消磨时间游戏机
zh.summary: Arduboy FX-C是一款信用卡大小的掌上游戏设备，在极其便携的形式下提供了全面的游戏和应用库。该设备将原始Arduboy的极简设计与生活质量改进相结合，虽然其有限的处理器推动开发者采用创意解决方案。

title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
summary: The article surveys the leading alternative browsers challenging Chrome and Safari's market dominance in 2026. These alternatives offer diverse features and philosophies designed to appeal to users seeking different browsing experiences and values.
content: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

title: This $300 pizza oven can easily help elevate your summer pizza nights
summary: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is a $300 electric pizza oven designed for consumers wanting quality pizza without the complexities of propane or wood-fired models. The appliance offers convenient access to authentic pizza-making in a home setting.
content: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is aimed at people who want delicious pizza nights without having to deal with things like propane or wood pellets, unlike many other pizza ovens.

title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
summary: TikTok is reportedly expanding beyond short-form video to develop into a comprehensive "super app" for various digital activities. This strategic shift reflects TikTok's ambitions to become a centralized platform for multiple services in users' daily lives.
content: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.

zh.title: TikTok成为超级应用的道路
zh.summary: 据报道，TikTok正在超越短视频范畴，发展成为一个全面的"超级应用"以服务各种数字活动。这一战略转变反映了TikTok希望成为用户日常生活中多种服务的中央平台的野心。

title: Sometimes, a short game hits the spot
summary: Slots & Daggers blends roguelike deckbuilding with slot machine mechanics, delivering an engaging experience with steady meta-progression that rewards repeated play. The game's appeal lies in its brevity—completable in roughly six hours, including all achievements—offering a refreshing alternative to lengthy gaming commitments. Its recent release across Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X/S expands accessibility for this indie success.
content:
Slots & Daggers, a low-key, fantasy-themed slot machine roguelike, was one of my favorite games last year. That may sound like a complicated description, but the game mixes ideas from deckbuilding roguelikes with slot machines to create an engrossing loop, and there's steady meta-progression that helps you push further with just about every run. Perhaps the best part is that Slots & Daggers is short: Solo developer Friedemann describes the game as a mini roguelike, and I completed it, including all 12 achievements, in just under six hours. This month, Slots & Daggers came out on the Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X / S, and  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 有时候，一款短游戏正是我们需要的
zh.summary: 《Slots & Daggers》将roguelike卡牌构建与老虎机机制相融合，提供了稳定的元进度系统来奖励重复游玩。这款游戏的吸引力在于它的简洁性——包括所有成就大约只需6小时就能完成——为冗长的游戏承诺提供了一个清爽的替代方案。它最近在任天堂Switch、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X/S上的发行扩展了这款独立游戏成功的可及性。

title: The SpaceX IPO is great for Elon Musk and terrible for you
summary: SpaceX filed for an IPO with a valuation exceeding $1 trillion despite reporting nearly $5 billion in losses last year and claiming a $28.5 trillion total addressable market. Critics argue the IPO structure benefits Musk and insiders while potentially leaving retail investors as "bagholders," drawing unfavorable comparisons to the WeWork debacle. The offering raises questions about whether astronomical valuations reflect realistic investor returns.
content:
Number go up? | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

I haven't seen anything as stupid as the WeWork IPO document in a very long time - that is, until Elon Musk filed to take SpaceX public. WeWork was a joke. SpaceX is a threat. And if Musk and his bankers have their way, you are going to be their bagholder.
Lots of the top-line details leaked long before the S-1 filing itself became public. There's the rumored valuation of more than $1 trillion. That's despite the nearly $5 billion in losses last year. The total addressable market (TAM) for SpaceX - the amount of revenue SpaceX thinks it could make if won over what it thinks is its entire customer base - was listed as $28.5 trillion. By way  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: SpaceX首次公开募股对埃隆·马斯克来说很棒，对你来说很糟糕
zh.summary: 尽管SpaceX去年报告损失近50亿美元，声称总可寻址市场为28.5万亿美元，但它仍以超过1万亿美元的估值申请首次公开募股。批评者辩称，首次公开募股的结构对马斯克和内部人士有利，而可能会让零售投资者沦为"包袱持有者"，这与WeWork的失败相比处于不利地位。该发行引发了一个问题：天文数字的估值是否反映了现实的投资者回报。

title: Grifters, cynics, and true believers: The family tree of vaccine opponents
summary: A new book examines the history of vaccine opposition, categorizing opponents into distinct groups: grifters seeking profit, cynics driven by distrust, and true believers convinced of genuine dangers. The work provides historical context for understanding modern anti-vaccine movements and their varied motivations. The categorization framework helps explain how vaccine skepticism persists despite scientific consensus.
content: A new book looks into the long history of people who have opposed vaccines.

zh.title: 骗子、愤世嫉俗者和真正的信徒：疫苗反对者的族谱
zh.summary: 一本新书考察了疫苗反对的历史，将反对者分为不同群体：为利润而诈骗的骗子、被不信任驱动的愤世嫉俗者，以及确信存在真正危险的真正信徒。这部作品为理解现代反疫苗运动及其多样化动机提供了历史背景。分类框架有助于解释为什么尽管有科学共识，疫苗怀疑仍然存在。

title: Environmentalists turn out in force to oppose Trump coal ash rollbacks
summary: Environmentalists mobilized against Trump administration proposals to shift coal ash regulation from federal to state oversight, effectively allowing states to bypass national environmental standards. The rollback would reduce centralized monitoring and enforcement of coal ash disposal, a significant pollutant with health and environmental implications. The opposition reflects broader tensions between deregulation efforts and environmental protection standards.
content: Trump admin wants to rely on states for coal ash monitoring, enforcement, allow them to bypass national standards.

zh.title: 环保主义者大规模动员反对特朗普政府煤灰监管回退
zh.summary: 环保主义者积极动员反对特朗普政府的提案，该提案旨在将煤灰监管权从联邦转移到州一级，实际上允许各州绕过国家环保标准。这种回退将减少对煤灰处置的集中监控和执法，而煤灰是一种具有健康和环境影响的重要污染物。这种反对反映了在放松管制努力和环境保护标准之间更广泛的紧张关系。

title: Founders seize on Indian court ruling to revive criticism of Google’s ad business
summary: An Indian court ruling has become ammunition for founder criticism of Google's ad practices and trademark handling. The decision could force platforms to reconsider policies on trademarked keywords in advertising.
content: The ruling drew support from founders, while lawyers said it could force platforms to revisit how they handle trademarked keywords.

zh.title: 创业者利用印度法院判决重启对谷歌广告业务的批评
zh.summary: 一项印度法院的判决已成为创业者批评谷歌广告做法和商标处理的有力武器。该判决可能迫使平台重新考虑其关于商标关键词广告投放的政策。

title: I went to the so-called ‘steroid Olympics,’ to understand why Silicon Valley is obsessed with peptides
summary: The Enhanced Games, a sporting competition featuring performance-enhancing drugs, signals a potential new business model that Silicon Valley is exploring. This reflects broader tech industry interest in peptides and performance optimization.
content: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.

zh.title: 我参加了所谓的"类固醇奥运会"，来理解为什么硅谷痴迷于多肽
zh.summary: 增强运动会是一项具有性能增强药物的体育竞赛，标志着硅谷正在探索的潜在新商业模式。这反映了科技行业对多肽和性能优化的广泛兴趣。
